expectations.text: Treats the prior PRD draft discussion as authoritative input context rather than restarting from zero
expectations.evidence: The response continues from the existing subscription PRD draft context rather than restarting requirement discovery.

expectations.text: Performs a gap review covering confirmed rules plus any remaining boundary, risk, or missing-decision items

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and explicitly asks for permission before generating the final downstream prompt

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-8 based on response.txt.
